table_metadata.table_description: A day by day record of sales department activity. dates back to the beginnning of 2019.

columns.name: index
columns.description: dummy primary key. likely will not be referenced in querries.

columns.name: date
columns.description: the exact day the resulting data is from. One row corrresponds to data from that specific day. One row per day.

columns.name: calls
columns.description: the numebr of calls the sales depertment received that day that got through to a sales representative.

columns.name: sales
columns.description: the number of sales the department completed that day. Note: not all sales become activations.

columns.name: acvtivations
columns.description: the number of direct activations that occurred on that day. should be comparable with direct adds in the subcount data.

columns.name: brm
columns.description: Buyer's remorese, defined as the number of customers who deactivated within 30 days of their activation date.

columns.name: year
columns.description: the year that date occurred on. Use this column for aggregation purposes, especially when comparing to other datasets.

columns.name: month
columns.description: the month the date occurred on. Use this column for aggregation purposes, especially when comparing to other datasets.
